title: Redstone Screens
description: An alternative way to view your computational Redstone contraptions.
body:
These screens can display up to 4096 colors on a 32x32 screen.

Example:
![Some of the 4096 colors.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b1c3d21ff8accdb800652a6887a4c6c631eb81c.png)

Each `Display Register` has toggleable R, G, and B channels. When one or more channels are enabled, the block sends its current redstone power level to the corresponding pixel color channels. Multiple blocks can contribute to the same pixel.

![Display Register GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dd42bdf963f6925166e8ba6afa0bbbab620fd4d.png)

Right-click the `Screen Display` item to view.

# To do:
- **Survival Crafting Recipes.**
- **Screen ID system for multiple screens.**
- **Dynamic/changable resolution**
